biological_replicate: C57BL/6 mice across five age groups (E18, P0, P3, P6, and P9)
experimental_design: We performed high-performance liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectrometry (LC-MS/MS) analysis of the proteome and lipidome of GC from C57BL/6 mice across five age groups...
factor_value: five age groups (E18, P0, P3, P6, and P9)
number_of_fractions: from two GC fractions: growth cone membrane (GCM) and growth cone particulate (GCP)
number_of_biological_replicates: five age groups (E18, P0, P3, P6, and P9)
number_of_samples: 5 biological replicates (age groups) and 2 fractions = 10 total samples.
